subject: [PATCH v6 11/22] zswap: move zswap entry management to the virtual swap descriptor

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch moves zswap entry management from a dedicated tree to the virtual swap descriptor, eliminating lock contention between zswap entries and reducing complexity in the codebase. The change involves modifying several files, including include/linux/zswap.h, mm/vswap.c, and mm/zswap.c, where new functions are added for storing, loading, and erasing zswap entries from the swap descriptor. The patch also includes a re-partitioning of the zswap pool by virtual swap cluster to improve performance. Overall, this change aims to simplify the code and reduce contention in the zswap system.
